29#include "pinocchio.h"
30
31//#define DEBUG
32
33#ifdef DEBUG
34 FILE *results;
35 char filename[300];
36#endif
37
38
39double greens_function(double *, double, int, int);
40
41int set_one_grid(int ThisGrid)
42{
43 ptrdiff_t L, M, N;
44 ptrdiff_t alloc_local, local_n0, local_0_start;
45 ptrdiff_t local_n1, local_1_start;
46
47 fftw_mpi_init();
48
49 MyGrids[ThisGrid].norm = 1.0
50 /(double)MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSglobal_x
51 /(double)MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSglobal_y
52 /(double)MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSglobal_z;
53 MyGrids[ThisGrid].CellSize = MyGrids[ThisGrid].BoxSize/(double)MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSglobal_x;
54
55 L=MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSglobal_x;
56 M=MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSglobal_y;
57 N=MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSglobal_z;
58
59 /* get local data size and allocate */
60 alloc_local = fftw_mpi_local_size_3d_transposed(L, M, N/2+1, MPI_COMM_WORLD,
61 &local_n0, &local_0_start,
62 &local_n1, &local_1_start);
63
64 MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_x = MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSglobal_x;
65 MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_y = MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSglobal_y;
66 MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_z = local_n0;
67
68 MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSstart_x = 0;
69 MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSstart_y = 0;
70 MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSstart_z = local_0_start;
71
72 MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_k_x = MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSglobal_x;
73 MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_k_y = local_n1;
74 MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_k_z = MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSglobal_z;
75
76 MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSstart_k_x = 0;
77 MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSstart_k_y = local_1_start;
78 MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSstart_k_z = 0;
79
80 MyGrids[ThisGrid].total_local_size_fft = 2*alloc_local;
81 MyGrids[ThisGrid].total_local_size = MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_x * MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_y * MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_z;
82
83 /* this gives is the number of unused x-grid points in rvector_fft */
84 if (MyGrids[0].GSglobal_x%2)
85 MyGrids[0].off=1;
86 else
87 MyGrids[0].off=2;
88
89 return 0;
90}
91
92int initialize_fft()
93{
94 ptrdiff_t L, M, N;
95 int igrid;
96
97 for (igrid=0; igrid<Ngrids; igrid++)
98 {
99
100 L=MyGrids[igrid].GSglobal_x;
101 M=MyGrids[igrid].GSglobal_y;
102 N=MyGrids[igrid].GSglobal_z;
103
104 /* create plan for out-of-place r2c DFT */
105 MyGrids[igrid].forward_plan = fftw_mpi_plan_dft_r2c_3d(L, M, N, rvector_fft[igrid], cvector_fft[igrid],
106 MPI_COMM_WORLD, FFTW_MEASURE + FFTW_MPI_TRANSPOSED_OUT);
107
108 MyGrids[igrid].reverse_plan = fftw_mpi_plan_dft_c2r_3d(L, M, N, cvector_fft[igrid], rvector_fft[igrid],
109 MPI_COMM_WORLD, FFTW_MEASURE + FFTW_MPI_TRANSPOSED_IN);
110 }
111
112 return 0;
113}
114
115
116double forward_transform(int ThisGrid)
117{
118 double time;
119
120 time=MPI_Wtime();
121
122 fftw_execute(MyGrids[ThisGrid].forward_plan);
123
124 return MPI_Wtime()-time;
125}
126
127
128double reverse_transform(int ThisGrid)
129{
130
131 int i;
132 double time;
133 // double ave, var; //levare
134
135 time=MPI_Wtime();
136
137 fftw_execute(MyGrids[ThisGrid].reverse_plan);
138
139 for (i=0; i<MyGrids[ThisGrid].total_local_size_fft; i++)
140 rvector_fft[ThisGrid][i]*=MyGrids[ThisGrid].norm;
141
142#ifdef DEBUG
143 for (i=0; i<MyGrids[ThisGrid].total_local_size_fft; i++)
144 fprintf(results, " %d %g \n", i, rvector_fft[ThisGrid][i]);
145 fclose(results);
146#endif
147
148 return MPI_Wtime()-time;
149}
150
151
152int finalize_fftw()
153{
154 int igrid;
155
156 for (igrid=Ngrids-1; igrid>=0; igrid--)
157 {
158 fftw_destroy_plan(MyGrids[igrid].forward_plan);
159 fftw_destroy_plan(MyGrids[igrid].reverse_plan);
160 }
161
162 for (igrid=Ngrids-1; igrid>=0; igrid--)
163 if (deallocate_fft_vectors(igrid))
164 return 1;
165
166 fftw_cleanup();
167
168 return 0;
169}
170
171
172
173int compute_derivative(int ThisGrid, int first_derivative, int second_derivative)
174{
175 int swap, local_x,local_y,local_z,ixx,iyy,izz,index,nxhalf,nyhalf,nzhalf;
176 double kx,ky,kz,kxnorm,kynorm,kznorm,green,k_squared,smoothing,tmp,time;
177 double diff_comp[4];
178
179
180#ifdef DEBUG
181 sprintf(filename,"results.%d-%d.%d",first_derivative,second_derivative,ThisTask);
182 results=fopen(filename,"w");
183#endif
184
185 /* k vectors */
186 kxnorm = 2.*PI/(double)MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSglobal_x;
187 kynorm = 2.*PI/(double)MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSglobal_y;
188 kznorm = 2.*PI/(double)MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSglobal_z;
189
190 /* Nyquist frequencies */
191 nxhalf = MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSglobal_x/2;
192 nyhalf = MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSglobal_y/2;
193 nzhalf = MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSglobal_z/2;
194
195 /* for first derivatives the real and imaginary parts must be swapped */
196 swap=((first_derivative==0 && second_derivative> 0) ||
197 (first_derivative> 0 && second_derivative==0));
198
199/*
200 NB: ix, iy and iz are global coordinates of the box (from 0 to N-1)
201 ix: [0,N/2]
202 iy, iz: [0,N-1]
203 iyy and izz are unfolded, they run from -N/2+1 to N/2 (ixx = ix)
204 local_x, local_y and local_z are local coordinates of the slice
205 (for the x and z coordinates they are the same as ix and iz)
206*/
207
208
209/* loop over k-space indices */
210/* This loop is correct for transposed order in FFTW */
211
212 for (local_z = 0; local_z < MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_k_z; local_z++)
213 {
214 izz = local_z + MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSstart_k_z;
215 if (local_z > nzhalf)
216 izz -= MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSglobal_z;
217 kz = kznorm*izz;
218
219 for (local_y = 0; local_y < MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_k_y; local_y++)
220 {
221 iyy = local_y + MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSstart_k_y;
222 if (iyy > nyhalf)
223 iyy -= MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSglobal_y;
224 ky = kynorm*iyy;
225
226 for (local_x = 0; local_x <= nxhalf; local_x++)
227 {
228 ixx = local_x;
229 kx = kxnorm*ixx;
230
231 k_squared = kx*kx + ky*ky + kz*kz;
232
233 /* corresponding index of real part in vector (imaginary in index + 1) */
234 index = 1 + 2*local_x + (MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSglobal_x+MyGrids[ThisGrid].off)
235 *(local_z + local_y* MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSglobal_z);
236
237 if (k_squared != 0.)
238 {
239
240 /* Gaussian smoothing window */
241 smoothing = exp(-0.5 * k_squared * Rsmooth * Rsmooth);
242
243 /* the components are stored in the vectors that control the differentiation */
244 diff_comp[0] = 1.0;
245 diff_comp[1] = kx;
246 diff_comp[2] = ky;
247 diff_comp[3] = kz;
248
249 green = greens_function(diff_comp, k_squared, first_derivative, second_derivative);
250
251 (cvector_fft[ThisGrid][index/2])[0] *= green * smoothing;
252 (cvector_fft[ThisGrid][index/2])[1] *= green * smoothing;
253 }
254
255 if (swap)
256 {
257 tmp = (cvector_fft[ThisGrid][index/2])[1];
258 (cvector_fft[ThisGrid][index/2])[1] = (cvector_fft[ThisGrid][index/2])[0];
259 (cvector_fft[ThisGrid][index/2])[0] = -tmp;
260 }
261 }
262 }
263 }
264
265 if (!ThisTask)
266 printf("[%s] compute_derivative: starting fft\n",fdate());
267
268 time=reverse_transform(ThisGrid);
269
270 if (!ThisTask)
271 printf("[%s] compute_derivative: done fft, cpu time = %f\n",fdate(),time);
272
273 cputime.fft+=time;
274
275 return 0;
276}
277
278
279double greens_function(double *diff_comp, double k_squared, int first_derivative, int second_derivative)
280{
281
282 /* in this case the greens_function is simply 1 */
283 if (first_derivative == -1 && second_derivative == -1)
284 return 1.0;
285
286 if (first_derivative==0 && second_derivative==0)
287 return -diff_comp[first_derivative]*diff_comp[second_derivative]/k_squared;
288 else
289 return diff_comp[first_derivative]*diff_comp[second_derivative]/k_squared;
290
291}
292
293
294void write_in_cvector(int ThisGrid, double *vector)
295{
296 int i;
297
298 for (i=0; i<MyGrids[ThisGrid].total_local_size_fft; i++)
299 *((double*)cvector_fft[ThisGrid]+i)=*(vector+i);
300
301}
302
303
304void write_from_cvector(int ThisGrid, double *vector)
305{
306 int i;
307
308 for (i=0; i<MyGrids[ThisGrid].total_local_size_fft; i++)
309 *(vector+i)=*((double*)cvector_fft[ThisGrid]+i);
310
311}
312
313
314void write_in_rvector(int ThisGrid, double *vector)
315{
316 int lx,ly,lz;
317
318 for (lz=0; lz<MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_z; lz++)
319 for (ly=0; ly<MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_y; ly++)
320 for (lx=0; lx<MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_x; lx++)
321 *(rvector_fft[ThisGrid] + lx + (MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_x + MyGrids[ThisGrid].off) * (ly + lz * MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_y)) =
322 *(vector + lx + MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_x *(ly + lz* MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_y));
323
324 for (lz=0; lz<MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_z; lz++)
325 for (ly=0; ly<MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_y; ly++)
326 for (lx=MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_x; lx<MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_x+MyGrids[ThisGrid].off; lx++)
327 *(rvector_fft[ThisGrid] + lx + (MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_x + MyGrids[ThisGrid].off) * (ly + lz * MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_y)) = 0.0;
328
329}
330
331
332void write_from_rvector(int ThisGrid, double *vector)
333{
334 int lx,ly,lz;
335
336 for (lz=0; lz<MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_z; lz++)
337 for (ly=0; ly<MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_y; ly++)
338 for (lx=0; lx<MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_x; lx++)
339 *(vector + lx + MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_x *(ly + lz* MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_y)) =
340 *(rvector_fft[ThisGrid] + lx + (MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_x + MyGrids[ThisGrid].off) * (ly + lz * MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_y));
341
342}
